ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Reminder - Action Needed
ham.body:
Hi [Name],

We hope you are enjoying the benefits of our cloud platform.

This is a friendly reminder that your subscription to the Pro Plan is set to expire on 15th May 2026. To keep uninterrupted access to all features, please renew your subscription at the earliest.

• Plan: Pro
• Current Price: ₹9,999/month
• Renewal Date: 15th May 2026
• Renewal Amount: ₹9,999

You can renew your subscription by clicking the following link:
<URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team at support@cloudify.com.

Thank you for being a valued customer!

Best regards,
Cloudify Billing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: IT Helpdesk Ticket - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

We have detected an unusual activity on your corporate account. As per our security policy, we need you to confirm your credentials immediately.

Ticket ID: IT-2026-05-03
Issue: Suspicious login attempt from an unknown IP address.

Please verify your account details by clicking the link below:
<URL>

If you do not confirm within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily suspended for security reasons.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
IT Support Team
XYZ Pvt. Ltd.
Support@xyz.com
